summary: Iteration 3 frontend-only verification. All requested rebrand/restructure checks pass except ONE: Navigation.jsx still contains the 'Процесс' link pointing to the removed #process section. Brand=AUTOHAUS everywhere (nav, footer, title, marquee), Process & ASMR sections fully removed from DOM, Services has exactly 4 cards (01–04, no 05) with header 'Четыре направления', Configurator preview redesigned (lg:col-span-6 / lg:col-span-6) with all 16 testids preserved, Configurator empty-submit shows error toast ('Заполните имя и телефон'), filled submit POSTs /api/leads with source='configurator' → 200, contact form heading reads 'Запишитесь на бесплатный осмотр.' and POSTs /api/leads with source='contact_form' → 200, hero overline is 'Detailing Studio' (no 'Established 2019'), before-after-handle present, 0 console errors at 1920x1080.

ui_bugs.issue: Nav still contains 'Процесс' link with href='#process' (data-testid='nav-link-process'). The Process section was removed from Landing.jsx, so this link scrolls to nothing/top. Spec explicitly states '#process and #asmr removed'. Fix: remove the {label: 'Процесс', href: '#process'} entry from the links array in /app/frontend/src/components/Navigation.jsx. Also consider adding a 'Протокол' (#protocol) link since the new SafetyProtocol section currently has no nav entry.

action_items: Remove 'Процесс' / #process entry from links array in /app/frontend/src/components/Navigation.jsx (also appears in the mobile menu since it reuses the same array). Optionally add a 'Протокол' #protocol link to expose the SafetyProtocol section.
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation.jsx links array still references #process even though the Process component is no longer imported/rendered in Landing.jsx — broken anchor.

Hero overline text 'Detailing Studio' is rendered OUTSIDE the inner flex column-content via a sibling motion.span above the headline; the top meta line ('№ 001 — Premium Wrapping') is in the same container as requested for left alignment — both look correctly aligned at 1920px.
SafetyProtocol still renders the protocol-stage-* testids twice (desktop + mobile trees) — carried over from iteration 2, still not addressed; recommend suffixing -desktop/-mobile.

Configurator toggle-headlights ('Бронирование оптики') is still rendered inside the configurator — this is intentional per the features_or_bugs_to_test spec (only the Services card 'Бронирование оптики' was to be removed), so no action needed but worth noting for clarity.
seed_data_creation: Created two TEST_ leads via UI: TEST_Iter3 (configurator, 200) and TEST_Iter3Contact (contact_form, 200).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-3 spec items verified pass except Navigation still exposes #process link. Configurator POST payload confirmed: {source: 'configurator', configuration: {film, finish, coverage, antichrome, darkout, headlights, estimated_price}}. Contact POST confirmed source='contact_form'. Title='AUTOHAUS — Premium Wrapping Studio · Kaliningrad'. Hero headline begins 'Преображаем'. No console errors. After main agent fixes Navigation links array no retest needed (trivial change).
rca of the issue: Navigation.jsx was not updated when Process section was removed from Landing.jsx in iteration 3. The links array still includes {label: 'Процесс', href: '#process'}. Reproduction: open landing → click 'ПРОЦЕСС' in nav → URL changes to #process but page does not scroll (no element with that id). Fix: delete that single entry; mobile menu uses same array so no further change needed.
